# Support

Need help with PRISM?

- **Questions & ideas** → [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/NovaCode37/Prism-platform/discussions)
- **Bugs** → [open an issue](https://github.com/NovaCode37/Prism-platform/issues/new/choose)
- **Try it first** → [getprism.su](https://getprism.su)

Please search existing issues and discussions before opening a new one. Thanks!
